programme.title: Patience
programme.desc: A young autistic girl witnesses her father's murder but is unable to tell anyone what happened.

programme.title: Grantchester on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Alphy's trip to reconcile with his mother takes a shocking turn when a passenger is murdered and he becomes the prime suspect; Leonard defends Raymond from Geordie; Miss Scott hides a big secret.

programme.title: Downton Abbey on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Bates is taken aback when Vera threatens to expose old secrets which could bring down the Crawleys. Mary is the only one who can protect the family, but she pays a high price when she turns to Carlisle for help.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: "The Bill" stars Roberta Taylor and Trudie Goodwin set off from Glasgow and charge around Stirlingshire, concluding with an auction in Harrogate; they are accompanied by experts Paul Laidlaw and James Braxton in two very nice classic cars.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Exploring how the American Revolution affected Britain, with sabotage, espionage and political unrest reshaping the empire.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Comics Carol Burnett and Niecy Nash see family mysteries solved by DNA.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up; The Long, Dull Winter
programme.desc: Arthur and D.W. work together to clean their rooms so they can go the park; Arthur has the winter blues.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Oscar and the Oscarbots; Picture Day
programme.desc: Oscar's Oscarbots get lost in town; Otto and Olive try to figure out why people are becoming plaid and striped.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris stumble upon a rare and endangered seedling of a butternut tree; while looking for its parent tree, they only discover dead ones.

programme.desc: The Hunters investigate a weather mystery surrounding massive rocks that move on their own in the desert.

programme.desc: Lyla has to help multiple people but rushes each task, which makes things worse; Lyla must use her left hand after hurting her right wrist.

programme.title: Carl the Collector

programme.desc: Carl's favorite sour pickle scratch-n-sniff sticker loses its smell; Carl notices that his baby blanket, Knit-Knit, has a hole in it.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: O Gives Daniel Space; Daniel and Miss Elaina Bake Pretzels
programme.desc: Daniel needs some space when O sits too close to him at the treehouse; Miss Elaina asks Daniel for more space when they make pretzels together at the bakery.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay

programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay create a game show for Grandma; Phoebe and Jay must find the best way to spend the community coin jar money by taking a building-wide vote.

programme.desc: Captain Donkey and her crew search for the Ruby Red Tater Treasure; Panda finds his favorite hoodie, but it no longer fits.
